chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1609 of 2020 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 10-02-2022 Mr. Amir Ali Bhutto, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Chandio, Additional Advocate General Sindh along with Aijaz Hussain Rajput, Assistant Director STEVTA, Region Sukkur..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Through this Petition, the Petitioner has sought the following relief(s): a. That this Honourable Court may kindly be pleased to direct the respondents to make Government Vocational School (Girls) Bagodero operational as the same has been closed. b. That this Honourable Court may kindly be pleased to direct the respondents to regularize the services of the petitioner as she has worked for almost 9 months without any break. c. Any other relief(s) which this Honorable Court may deem fit and proper. d. To award the cost of petition. We have confronted the Petitioner’s Counsel as to the appointment and learned Counsel has referred to Page-23; however, on perusal of the same, it appears that the said appointment was on temporary daily wages basis with a rider that permanency shall not be claimed. In view of such position, the Petition does not merit any consideration and is accordingly dismissed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
